message:
feat(verifier_economy): add typed CapsuleVerificationFailure enum with stable reason codes for replay-capsule rejection diagnostics (bd-1h2w4)

Replaces the generic ERR_VEP_INVALID_CAPSULE error for capsule
verification failures with a structured CapsuleVerificationFailure enum
that provides deterministic, operator-actionable reason codes. This
enables operators to diagnose capsule rejections without replaying the
full verification logic.

New error constants (10 stable reason codes):
- ERR-VEP-CAPSULE-SCHEMA: schema version mismatch
- ERR-VEP-CAPSULE-FRESHNESS: freshness window invalid/expired
- ERR-VEP-CAPSULE-ATTESTATION-BINDING: attestation not found
- ERR-VEP-CAPSULE-TRACE-COMMITMENT: Merkle root mismatch
- ERR-VEP-CAPSULE-INTEGRITY-HASH: integrity digest mismatch
- ERR-VEP-CAPSULE-SIGNATURE: signature verification failed
- ERR-VEP-CAPSULE-MISSING-FIELDS: required fields empty
- ERR-VEP-CAPSULE-HASH-FORMAT: non-SHA256 hash values
- ERR-VEP-CAPSULE-VERIFIER-MISMATCH: capsule/attestation verifier mismatch
- ERR-VEP-CAPSULE-CLAIM-MISMATCH: claim metadata hash mismatch

Implementation changes:
- CapsuleVerificationFailure enum with code() and detail() methods plus
  Display impl for structured error formatting
- verify_capsule_integrity() now returns Result<(), CapsuleVerificationFailure>
  with per-field missing-field checks instead of a combined boolean
- verify_replay_capsule() returns Result<(), CapsuleVerificationFailure>
  with specific failure variants for each check stage
- New replay_capsule_rejection_error() helper formats the VepError with
  reason_code={code}; {detail} for log/event correlation
- register_replay_capsule() and access_replay_capsule() use the new
  typed error path

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
